input.system:
You are a streaming video agent. You observe 2-second video chunks and maintain memory.

Each turn you receive: visual frames (recent 24s window) + text memory (compressed summaries + recent thinks + pending questions). Output exactly ONE action:

1) <think>obs</think><action>silent</action>
   Use when: no question to answer, or pending question whose answer is not yet visible.

2) <think>obs</think><action>response</action><response>answer</response>
   Use when: the answer is currently visible — in frames, recent thinks, compressed summaries, or a recall_result just returned by the system.

3) <think>obs</think><action>recall</action><query>{"query":"keywords","time_range":"start-end"}</query>
   Use when: the answer is NOT in any visible source but you believe it was observed earlier. The system will search past observations and return a <recall_result> in your next input. Write 3-5 discriminative keywords (entity names + attributes), no answer values.

4) <think>obs</think><action>compress</action><summary>{"time_range":[s,e],"text":"..."}</summary>
   Use when: system sends <compress_trigger>. Summarize the specified thinks. Retain ALL entity names, visual attributes, OCR, and state changes. If no range is specified, select the oldest thinks to compress.

Think rules:
- 40-60 tokens, describe ONLY what is newly visible in the current chunk.
- No meta-reasoning, no sound/smell/emotion, no speculation.
- Maintain consistent entity names from memory (e.g., chef_1, pot_1).

recent_thinks: [0-2] The scene changes from a black screen to show a silver, metallic graphic appearing on the left. Geometric polygon shapes with a textured surface patterned with small dots and wavy lines emerge from the edge. The background remains predominantly black while this shiny, industrial-looking design slides into the frame.

[2-4] The silver metallic background featuring wavy lines and rivets fills the entire screen. A thick, green brushstroke arc sweeps across the center from left to right. Inside the curve of this green graphic, the text "NEO" appears in bold, black, capital letters, completing the logo composition against the industrial texture.

[4-6] The scene transitions to an outdoor setting featuring a silver diamond-plate metal surface on the left and a vertical metal pole on the right. In the blurred background, a red and black Harley-Davidson sign stands against a blue sky with green trees. Fragments of the previous green and silver graphics overlay the new footage during the transition.

[6-8] The transition finishes, showing a red and black Harley-Davidson sign against a blue sky. The scene cuts to a wide shot of the dealership building with an orange facade and beige brick walls. Several motorcycles are parked on the pavement in front of the glass entrance, where a group of people stands near the bikes.

samples.output: <think>A large black vehicle surface enters the foreground left, blocking the view of the motorcycles. The scene transitions to a blurry, moving shot of a grassy roadside and a blurred red sign post on the right, indicating travel away from the building.</think><action>silent</action>

[0-4] A black screen transitions to a silver metallic graphic with geometric polygons and wavy lines. The texture fills the screen as a green brushstroke arc sweeps across, revealing "NEO" in bold black letters.
[4-8] The scene shifts outdoors with a silver diamond-plate surface and pole in the foreground, overlaying a blurred red and black Harley-Davidson sign. The view clears to show the sign, then cuts to the dealership building with an orange facade and beige brick. Motorcycles are parked outside near people.
[8-10] A black vehicle surface obscures the view before transitioning to a blurry shot of a grassy roadside.
[10-14] Inside a dark trailer, a motorcycle with a lit headlight is maneuvered out. A low-angle close-up highlights the chrome exhaust, engine, and spoked front wheel as the rider, wearing blue jeans and brown boots, positions the bike. The camera pulls back to reveal a blonde man in a blue plaid shirt on the red motorcycle, stationary on the pavement with a trailer and trees behind.

recent_thinks: [14-16] A close-up shows a man with brown hair wearing a blue shirt standing next to an orange trailer. The trailer has a silver corner piece with vertical "NEO" text. He looks toward the camera and speaks, with a blue sky and green trees visible in the background.

[16-18] A man with brown hair in a blue shirt stands before an orange trailer, speaking with animated facial expressions. His mouth opens and closes as he talks, facing slightly right. The silver corner guard with vertical text is visible on the trailer behind him, set against a clear blue sky and distant green trees.

[18-20] The man with brown hair wearing a blue shirt continues speaking while standing before the orange trailer. His mouth opens and closes as he talks, and his head remains relatively still. The silver corner piece with vertical text on the trailer is visible behind his right shoulder against a clear blue sky.

[20-22] The scene cuts to a full view of the orange trailer parked on pavement. It features a silver diamond-plate lower section, a black graphic on the rear side, and the NEO logo near the top. The trailer has dual axles with black rims, positioned against a background of green fields and a clear blue sky.

[22-24] The orange trailer remains stationary on the pavement, displaying its silver diamond-plate lower section and black rear graphic. Large, bright green text reading "NAMR" with a white outline appears on the left side of the frame, superimposed over the trailer's side panel against the blue sky background.

Each turn you receive: visual frames (recent 24s window) + text memory (compressed summaries + recent thinks + pending questions). Output exactly ONE action:

1) <think>obs</think><action>silent</action>
   Use when: no question to answer, or pending question whose answer is not yet visible.

2) <think>obs</think><action>response</action><response>answer</response>
   Use when: the answer is currently visible — in frames, recent thinks, compressed summaries, or a recall_result just returned by the system.

3) <think>obs</think><action>recall</action><query>{"query":"keywords","time_range":"start-end"}</query>
   Use when: the answer is NOT in any visible source but you believe it was observed earlier. The system will search past observations and return a <recall_result> in your next input. Write 3-5 discriminative keywords (entity names + attributes), no answer values.

4) <think>obs</think><action>compress</action><summary>{"time_range":[s,e],"text":"..."}</summary>
   Use when: system sends <compress_trigger>. Summarize the specified thinks. Retain ALL entity names, visual attributes, OCR, and state changes. If no range is specified, select the oldest thinks to compress.

Think rules:
- 40-60 tokens, describe ONLY what is newly visible in the current chunk.
- No meta-reasoning, no sound/smell/emotion, no speculation.
- Maintain consistent entity names from memory (e.g., chef_1, pot_1).

compressed_segments.text:
[0-4] A black screen transitions to a silver metallic graphic with geometric polygons and wavy lines. The texture fills the screen as a green brushstroke arc sweeps across, revealing "NEO" in bold black letters.
[4-8] The scene shifts outdoors with a silver diamond-plate surface and pole in the foreground, overlaying a blurred red and black Harley-Davidson sign. The view clears to show the sign, then cuts to the dealership building with an orange facade and beige brick. Motorcycles are parked outside near people.
[8-10] A black vehicle surface obscures the view before transitioning to a blurry shot of a grassy roadside.
[10-14] Inside a dark trailer, a motorcycle with a lit headlight is maneuvered out. A low-angle close-up highlights the chrome exhaust, engine, and spoked front wheel as the rider, wearing blue jeans and brown boots, positions the bike. The camera pulls back to reveal a blonde man in a blue plaid shirt on the red motorcycle, stationary on the pavement with a trailer and trees behind.

[14-20] A man with brown hair wearing a blue shirt stands next to an orange trailer, speaking with animated expressions. A silver corner piece with vertical "NEO" text is visible behind him against a blue sky and distant trees. [20-24] The scene cuts to a full view of the orange trailer on pavement, featuring a silver diamond-plate lower section, black rear graphics, dual axles with black rims, and a "NEO" logo. Large green text "NAMR" with a white outline overlays the left side. [24-28] The camera shows a close-up of a silver aluminum track with circular holes and stamped "NEO" lettering mounted on a textured gray floor. The view pans along the hardware strip, revealing the dark interior wall and bright light with green grass visible through the rear opening.

[28-32] The camera pans up a trailer corner featuring two shades of orange panels above silver diamond-plate cladding. A silver bracket with vertical "NEO" lettering and a curved aluminum roof cap appear against a blue sky.
[32-36] A man in a blue shirt stands before the orange trailer, which displays a green and yellow "NEO" logo. He turns his head and speaks.
[36-42] A close-up shows a silver aluminum rear frame with "NAM" text near a red reflector. A hand manipulates a metal pin latch. The view shifts low to reveal the undercarriage and dual tires as a vertical support leg extends. Finally, a hand pulls a cotter pin from the latch mechanism.

[42-46] A hand pulls a cotter pin and rotates a metal latch handle outward on a silver aluminum frame near a red reflector. [46-54] A man in a plaid shirt rides a red motorcycle up a silver aluminum ramp into a trailer stabilized by an extended vertical support leg. The trailer side features "NAM" text near a red reflector, with a beige building in the background. The motorcycle advances until it is completely inside the trailer's dark interior. [54-56] A green "NEO" logo appears on a silver diamond-plate background. Following a transition, a hand wearing a blue sleeve and red wristband reaches for a silver recessed door handle on a black trailer wall.

[60-64] A man in a blue button-down shirt stands centered against a bright orange trailer wall featuring a green and black NEO logo in the upper right. He speaks while facing forward, placing his hands on his hips. [64-68] The view shifts to the interior, focusing on silver aluminum tie-down tracks. One shot shows a D-ring on the black textured floor with vertical perforated tracks on the rear walls. Another shows a track mounted on the lower wall frame with a D-ring and a detached silver track piece with circular holes lying on the floor. [68-72] Bright green text reading L-TRACK appears. Close-ups show a silver metal fitting inserted into the aluminum track channel on the dark surface.

recent_thinks: [56-58] A man with short brown hair wearing a blue button-down shirt stands centered in front of a bright orange trailer wall. He looks directly at the camera with a neutral expression. The green and black "NEO" logo appears in the upper right corner of the trailer surface behind him.

[58-60] The man in the blue button-down shirt stands before the orange trailer wall, facing the camera directly. His mouth opens slightly as he appears to speak. The green and black NEO logo is clearly visible in the upper right corner of the trailer surface behind him.

[72-74] The scene cuts back to the man in the blue button-down shirt standing in front of the orange trailer. He faces the camera directly with his mouth slightly open, appearing to speak. The green and black NEO logo is clearly visible on the trailer wall in the upper right corner behind him.

[74-76] The scene cuts to a close-up of a silver hinge with a white tag labeled "ProFlap" near an aluminum track. A person in a blue shirt stands in the background holding a cable attached to the black ramp surface. Bright green text reading "PRO FLAP" overlays the left side of the screen.

queries.question: Is the man wearing a blue collared shirt standing behind the large orange trailer?

samples.output: <think>The scene displays a wide view of the black textured ramp with a central silver aluminum track containing circular holes. Green text reading PRO FLAP overlays the left side. A hand holds a white cable at the top left edge, set against a background of green grass and blue sky.</think><action>silent</action>

You are a streaming video agent. You observe 2-second video chunks and maintain memory.

Each turn you receive: visual frames (recent 24s window) + text memory (compressed summaries + recent thinks + pending questions). Output exactly ONE action:

1) <think>obs</think><action>silent</action>
   Use when: no question to answer, or pending question whose answer is not yet visible.

2) <think>obs</think><action>response</action><response>answer</response>
   Use when: the answer is currently visible — in frames, recent thinks, compressed summaries, or a recall_result just returned by the system.

3) <think>obs</think><action>recall</action><query>{"query":"keywords","time_range":"start-end"}</query>
   Use when: the answer is NOT in any visible source but you believe it was observed earlier. The system will search past observations and return a <recall_result> in your next input. Write 3-5 discriminative keywords (entity names + attributes), no answer values.

4) <think>obs</think><action>compress</action><summary>{"time_range":[s,e],"text":"..."}</summary>
   Use when: system sends <compress_trigger>. Summarize the specified thinks. Retain ALL entity names, visual attributes, OCR, and state changes. If no range is specified, select the oldest thinks to compress.

Think rules:
- 40-60 tokens, describe ONLY what is newly visible in the current chunk.
- No meta-reasoning, no sound/smell/emotion, no speculation.
- Maintain consistent entity names from memory (e.g., chef_1, pot_1).
